title: Line slope
content: For y = mx + b, the slope is m. Use slope to answer line rate-of-change questions.

title: Line y-intercept
content: For y = mx + b, the y-intercept is b, the value where x=0.

title: Line x-axis intersection
content: The x-axis intersection is where y=0.

title: Parabola vertex
content: For y=(x-h)^2+k, the vertex is (h,k).

title: Function monotonicity
content: A line with positive slope is increasing; a line with negative slope is decreasing.

title: Sine period
content: The standard sine curve sin(x) has period 2*pi.

title: Bar chart maximum
content: The maximum category is represented by the tallest bar.

title: Bar chart minimum
content: The minimum category is represented by the shortest bar.

title: Bar chart difference
content: Difference means maximum value minus minimum value.

title: Bar chart total
content: The total value is the sum of all bar values.

title: Bar chart ranking
content: Ranking from largest to smallest sorts categories by descending value.

title: Line chart trend
content: Overall increasing means values rise from the first point to the last point.

title: Line chart peak
content: The peak value is the largest point in a line chart.

title: Line chart valley
content: The valley value is the smallest point in a line chart.

title: Line chart growth
content: Growth from first to last equals last value minus first value.

title: Pie chart largest share
content: The largest pie slice has the greatest percentage share.

title: Pie chart percentage
content: A pie chart slice label gives the percentage for that category.

title: Pie chart category comparison
content: Compare pie slices by their percentages.

title: Triangle angle sum
content: Angles in a triangle sum to 180 degrees.

title: Rectangle area
content: Rectangle area equals width times height.

title: Circle area
content: Circle area is pi times radius squared.

title: Derivative power rule
content: The derivative of x^n is n*x^(n-1).

title: Fraction simplification
content: Simplify a fraction by dividing numerator and denominator by their greatest common divisor.

title: Solve linear equation
content: For x+a=b, subtract a from both sides to get x=b-a.

title: Simple integral
content: The integral of 2x is x^2 + C.

title: Coordinate point reading
content: Read a coordinate point as (x,y).

title: Coordinate distance
content: Distance between two points is sqrt((x2-x1)^2+(y2-y1)^2).

title: Coordinate midpoint
content: Midpoint equals ((x1+x2)/2,(y1+y2)/2).

title: Coordinate slope
content: Slope between two points is (y2-y1)/(x2-x1).

title: Table reading
content: Read a table value by locating the requested row or category.

title: Table maximum
content: The largest table category has the highest value.

title: Table comparison
content: Compare table categories by their numeric values.

title: Table total
content: The total table value is the sum of all listed values.
